25 Darius Coleman

25 Darius Coleman

Summary

Biography

Pronunciation


2025-26: Appeared and started in two contests...Tallied 29 points (14.5 per game), 11 rebounds (5.5 per game), and 58 minutes (29 per game)...Totaled 17 points and six rebounds while shooting 50 percent from the field against Adelphi (Nov. 16).
No stats available for the current season.
